summary: P2-2-001 initial geometry contract and P2-3-002 body-only torque baseline were implemented, documented, and verified by automated tests.
non_blocking_issues: The current paper_table1 initializer prioritizes bond/bend/torsion and derives helix radius around 0.279 b, so the radius tolerance is documented as an operational tolerance rather than exact paper equality.
tests_reviewed: uv run pytest tests/test_simulation.py -k "phase2_initial_geometry or phase23_body_only_torque_baseline"
uv run pytest tests/test_simulation.py -k "phase2_execution_and_diagnostics_guidance_exists_in_project_plan or phase2_initial_geometry or phase23_body_only_torque_baseline"
commit hook: uv run ruff format --check .
commit hook: uv run ruff check .
adr_reason: No significant architecture, output format, dependency, or physical-model change was introduced; the work formalizes existing diagnostics and documents current model tolerances.
next_actions: Proceed to Phase 2.4 body+hook motor-on stability and hook failure boundary work.
Tighten the paper_table1 radius tolerance only if a future initializer is designed to satisfy radius/pitch and bend/torsion simultaneously.
